description: Schema contract for the NPS rolling aggregation dataflow. Describes the source table columns consumed and the output Delta table columns produced.

columns.name: date
columns.note: Timestamp of the survey interview. Used to compute ISO week and apply the rolling window filter.

columns.name: scope
columns.note: Customer touchpoint. Rows with any other scope value are filtered out.

columns.name: region
columns.note: Source region codes; normalized to output codes by the dataflow.

columns.name: market
columns.note: Country code. Passed through unchanged; renamed to COUNTRY in output.

columns.name: brand
columns.note: Internal brand identifier. Characters at index 2–3 (0-based) contain the 2-char brand code used in output.

columns.name: vehicle
columns.note: Vehicle segment. Values not in the allowed list are replaced with '-'.

columns.name: engine
columns.note: Powertrain type. Values not in the allowed list are replaced with '-'.

columns.name: model
columns.note: Commercial model name. Null, '#N/A', long part codes, or digit-starting codes are replaced with '-'.

columns.name: nps_score
columns.note: Raw NPS score. Used to derive the ANSWERS bucket. Rows with null score are excluded.

output.note: No duplicate combinations of the composite key should exist in any daily export.

columns.name: PERIOD
columns.note: ISO 8601 week identifier. WW is zero-padded. Year is determined by the ISO Thursday rule.

columns.name: BRAND
columns.note: Extracted from the source brand field (characters at index 2–3).

columns.name: MODEL
columns.note: Uppercased commercial model name, or '-' for missing/invalid values.

columns.name: QID
columns.note: This dataflow processes only the recommendation question.

columns.name: ANSWERS
columns.note: NPS score bucket. Each value has a leading space — required by the output specification.

columns.name: SURVEYS
columns.note: Count of survey responses for this combination of dimensions. Not part of the composite key.
